mapper.insert: INSERT INTO measurement_sessions (`쉼표번호`, started_at, device_type) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{startedAt}, #{deviceType})
INSERT INTO heart_rate_measurements (session_id, `쉼표번호`, bpm, hrv, measured_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{쉼표번호}, #{bpm}, #{hrv}, #{measuredAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, `쉼표번호`, bpm, hrv, measured_at FROM heart_rate_measurements WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY measured_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diagnosis_results (`쉼표번호`, session_id, stress_index, primary_rest_type, scores_json, diagnosed_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{sessionId}, #{stressIndex}, #{primaryRestType}, #{scoresJson}, #{diagnosedAt})
INSERT INTO rest_type_scores (diagnosis_result_id, rest_type, score, ranking) VALUES (#{diagnosisResultId}, #{restType}, #{score}, #{ranking})
mapper.select: SELECT id, `쉼표번호`, session_id, stress_index, primary_rest_type, scores_json, diagnosed_at FROM diagnosis_results WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} ORDER BY diagnosed_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, `쉼표번호`, session_id, stress_index, primary_rest_type, scores_json, diagnosed_at FROM diagnosis_results WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} ORDER BY diagnosed_at DESC
SELECT id, diagnosis_result_id, rest_type, score, ranking FROM rest_type_scores WHERE diagnosis_result_id = #{diagnosisResultId} ORDER BY ranking
